auditor: Claude SEO — 8 specialist agents (Technical, Content, Schema, Sitemap, Google API, GEO, Backlinks, SXO)
stack: Next.js 15 static export · Cloudflare Pages · India-primary market
note: Prior audit (2026-06-21) showed 81/100 using estimated PSI data. This audit uses live PSI run revealing actual mobile LCP of 10,501 ms (POOR), dropping technical and performance scores significantly.

summary.delta_note: Score drop reflects actual PSI data (mobile LCP 10,501 ms) vs June-21 estimate; site conditions unchanged.
summary.business_type: SaaS Tool — Document Photo & Form-Resize for India
top_findings: Mobile LCP 10,501 ms — POOR (4.2× threshold); 3 unoptimised PNG images = 2,076 KB above the fold
Exam pages returning 404 — entire exam keyword cluster (14/100 SXO score) invisible to Google
/blog/ hub page never crawled by Googlebot — no inbound link from any regularly-crawled page
Zero meta descriptions across all audited pages — reduces CTR and AI citation quality
quick_wins: Convert hero PNGs to WebP — expected mobile LCP drop from 10,501 ms to ~2,200 ms (GOOD)
Add /blog/ to site navigation — fixes Google's /blog/ indexation failure, zero content changes
Add <link rel='preload' as='image' fetchpriority='high'> for LCP image — ~300 ms further gain
Add meta descriptions to top 5 pages — immediate CTR and AI citation improvement

scores.backlinks_note: INSUFFICIENT DATA — domain 17 days old, predates Common Crawl crawl; no Moz/Bing configured

cwv.source: PageSpeed Insights Lab Data — CrUX ineligible (insufficient Chrome traffic at 17 days)
lcp_root_causes: No preload hint — late browser discovery

gsc.top_opportunity_note: 3 queries at positions 3-9 with 6 total impressions and 0 clicks — highest single-page opportunity

blog.note: Returns 200, in sitemap, but no inbound link from crawled pages

indexation.www_split_note: At least 3 page families indexed under www.easyphoto.in separately

categories.name: Technical SEO
what_works: TTFB 11-22 ms (Cloudflare Singapore edge — excellent for India)
CLS 0.001/0.003 GOOD on both devices
PSI SEO score 100/100 on both devices
Security: all 7 major headers present, 2-year HSTS preload-eligible
Static SSG — full content on first byte, no JS rendering for indexation
AI crawlers explicitly allowed in robots.txt (GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot, OAI-SearchBot)
Breadcrumbs rich result passing (confirmed by Google URL Inspection API)
258/258 sitemap URLs return 200

findings.title: Mobile LCP 10,501 ms — POOR
findings.description: 4.2× above the 2,500 ms Good threshold. Root cause: 3 raw PNGs above the fold totaling 2,076 KB. Secondary causes: no preload hint, render-blocking CSS (320-475 ms), AdSense main thread (156 ms), non-composited animation (650 ms reflow), legacy JS polyfills (107-141 ms).
findings.recommendation: Convert hero images to WebP at display size (<50 KB each). Add fetchpriority=high preload in app/layout.tsx. Defer AdSense. Fix .animate-scan-beam to use transform/opacity.
findings.expected_impact: Mobile LCP from 10,501 ms to ~2,200 ms (GOOD)

findings.title: /blog/ hub page never crawled by Googlebot
findings.description: Confirmed via URL Inspection API. Page returns 200, is in sitemap with correct lastmod, but has never been crawled. No inbound link from any regularly-crawled page (homepage nav, footer, or body content).
findings.recommendation: Add /blog/ link to site navigation header or footer. One link from homepage triggers Googlebot crawl within days.
findings.expected_impact: /blog/ indexed within 1-2 weeks; hub-and-spoke link flow restored

findings.title: www vs non-www canonicalization split
findings.description: GSC shows at least 3 page families indexed under both www.easyphoto.in and easyphoto.in simultaneously, diluting link equity.
findings.recommendation: Add Cloudflare Redirect Rule: www.easyphoto.in/* → easyphoto.in/$1 (301 permanent).

findings.title: LCP image discovery — no preload hint
findings.description: Lighthouse lcp-discovery-insight: browser discovers LCP image only after HTML parse + render, not from <head>.
findings.recommendation: Add <link rel='preload' as='image' href='/images/sample4_before_[hash].webp' fetchpriority='high'> in app/layout.tsx.
findings.expected_impact: ~300 ms LCP improvement on top of WebP conversion

findings.title: .animate-scan-beam non-composited animation
findings.description: Inline background-color animation causes 650 ms of forced style/layout work during page load.
findings.recommendation: Replace with transform/opacity animation to run on GPU compositor thread.

categories.name: Content Quality
what_works: Blog posts have visible author (Jaspal Kumar) with credentials
Tool pages: accurate per-exam/country specs (dimensions, KB limits, background colour)
Privacy USP clearly stated on tool pages ('processed in your browser, never uploaded')
FAQPage schema with 5+ Q&A pairs
On-device processing angle is a genuine E-E-A-T differentiator

findings.title: /india/ URL returns 404
findings.description: Hard 404 on a URL that users expect and that may have inbound links. Correct URL is /india-passport-photo-maker/.
findings.recommendation: Add to next.config.js redirects: { source: '/india/', destination: '/india-passport-photo-maker/', permanent: true }. Audit all /{country}/ shorthand patterns.

findings.title: Blog post thin — /blog/why-exam-photo-signature-rejected/
findings.description: 1,030 words — 36% below the 1,600-word minimum for competitive exam queries. Sections are 80-100 words each.
findings.recommendation: Expand to 1,800+ words: per-rejection-reason section with step-by-step fix, spec table, and embedded tool CTA.

findings.title: Zero meta descriptions site-wide
findings.description: No <meta name='description'> on any of the 7 audited pages. Google and AI search engines fall back to arbitrary body text.
findings.recommendation: Add unique meta descriptions (150-160 chars) to all pages via Next.js metadata API. Start: homepage, /passport-photo/, /india-passport-photo-maker/, top 5 exam pages.

findings.title: No author attribution on exam pages
findings.description: Blog posts credit Jaspal Kumar; all 53 exam-requirements pages have no author. E-E-A-T inconsistency.
findings.recommendation: Add author byline + last-verified date to all exam-requirements pages.

categories.name: On-Page SEO
what_works: PSI SEO 100/100 on mobile and desktop
Canonical tags present and correct on indexed pages
Heading hierarchy correct (H1 → H2 → H3)

findings.title: Meta descriptions missing site-wide
findings.description: Absent on all audited pages. Direct CTR and snippet quality impact.
findings.recommendation: Add via Next.js metadata export on each page.

findings.title: Army Agniveer page: 3 ranking queries, 0 clicks
findings.description: GSC: /exam-requirements/army-agniveer/ has 6 impressions at positions 3-9 across 3 queries (army photo, army signature, indian army passport photo) with zero clicks. Title/H1 mismatch.
findings.recommendation: Update title: 'Army Agniveer Photo & Signature Size Requirements 2026 | easyPhoto'. Add FAQPage schema using those 3 queries as questions.

findings.title: ECI photo resize page at pos 6.5 with 6 impressions, 0 clicks
findings.description: Highest impression count in the positions 4-10 band. Title mismatch with query 'eci photo resize'.
findings.recommendation: Update H1 to: 'ECI Photo Resize for Voter ID — Free Online Tool'. Ensure meta description includes 'eci photo resize'.

categories.name: Schema / Structured Data
what_works: Organization, WebSite, SoftwareApplication schemas on homepage
FAQPage schema with 5 Q&A pairs
BlogPosting schema on all 24 blog posts (author, dates, inLanguage: en-IN)
BreadcrumbList on category and tool pages
Breadcrumbs rich result confirmed passing by Google

findings.title: BlogPosting.image using generic /og.png
findings.description: All 24 blog posts use the site-level /og.png as image. Google requires a unique per-post image for Article rich result eligibility.
findings.recommendation: Wire per-post OG image URL into BlogPosting.image property (already generated per-post — 1-line schema change).

findings.title: WebSite.SearchAction missing
findings.description: No Sitelinks Searchbox markup.
findings.recommendation: Add SearchAction with target URL pattern to WebSite schema.

findings.title: Organization.sameAs limited to Pinterest only
findings.description: Missing all other social profiles and directories.
findings.recommendation: Add YouTube, Instagram, LinkedIn once those accounts are created.

categories.name: Performance (CWV)
what_works: Desktop LCP 1,921 ms — GOOD
CLS GOOD on both devices
TBT GOOD on both devices
TTFB 11-22 ms

findings.title: Mobile LCP 10,501 ms — POOR
findings.description: Single biggest ranking risk. Google uses mobile-first crawling. Indian 4G users will experience real-world LCP worse than the lab test.
findings.recommendation: WebP hero images + preload hint is the primary fix. Expected result: GOOD after single deploy.

categories.name: AI Search Readiness
what_works: All 5 major AI crawlers explicitly allowed in robots.txt
llms.txt present and comprehensive
FAQPage schema aids AI extraction
BlogPosting with author + dates on all posts

findings.title: Zero meta descriptions — AI citation fallback to arbitrary text
findings.description: Without meta descriptions, AI systems extract arbitrary body text as summaries, reducing citation accuracy.
findings.recommendation: Add meta descriptions to all pages.

findings.title: llms-full.txt absent
findings.description: llms.txt exists but llms-full.txt is absent. AI agents must make secondary fetches for spec data.
findings.recommendation: Create llms-full.txt with inline spec tables for all 24 country presets and 52 exam portals.

findings.title: Zero YouTube presence
findings.description: YouTube mention correlation with AI citation frequency ~0.737 — strongest single predictor. Zero YouTube content.
findings.recommendation: Publish 3 core videos. Highest long-term AI citation ROI.

categories.name: Images
what_works: Alt text present on hero images
Image dimensions set (no CLS from images)

findings.title: 3 hero PNG images totaling 2,076 KB
findings.description: sample2_before (800 KB), sample4_before (713 KB), sample4_after (563 KB) serve full-resolution originals to all devices. WebP at display size: ~40-60 KB each.
findings.recommendation: Convert to WebP using Next.js <Image> with sizes prop, or offline conversion to static WebP. Target: <60 KB per image.

findings.title: Zero inline images in blog posts
findings.description: 0 inline images across 26 blog posts. SERP competitors use 3-8 images per post.
findings.recommendation: Add 2+ screenshots or diagrams per blog post. Start with top 5 GSC-impressioned posts.
